race.comment: MISS BERNARDO (4) had a tough draw to overcome and was game in defeat when only a neck from KRAKEN SANDY in second (22.53) at this track. Top chance in this line up. KRAKEN SANDY (1) is a promising type who notched his 3rd career success when too good (22.52) at this track last time. Won at his only start from this draw. Has put together a string of wins and expected to go close again. SWEET I AM (6) goes very well this trip starting eight times for three wins and four minors. Recorded a neck win (22.32) in a Mix 6/7 H last time at this track. Looks one of the chances. Something for the Multiples: TEDDY TEQUILA (5)
